name: knowledgebase
description: Upload documents and search them with AI — PDF, DOCX, TXT supported. Replaces FAQ with semantic search.
author: CupBots
intent: Search uploaded documents (PDF, DOCX) for answers using AI
config: API key for the Chunker RAG service

marketplace.tagline: Turn your docs into an instant AI knowledge base
marketplace.long_description: Upload PDFs, Word docs, and text files to build a searchable knowledge base for your group. Ask questions in plain language and get AI-powered answers with source citations. Tag documents for organized filtering. Enable auto-answer mode and the bot proactively answers member questions from your uploaded documents — like having a support agent that actually read the manual.
